shot_notes: The peak of the Wizard's illusion
evidence_summary: Execute the visual transition from a grand, magical illusion to a mundane, mechanical reality. The sequence must strip away the perceived divinity of the Wizard by revealing the physical stagecraft and the smallness of the man behind it.
The illusions vanish or are bypassed, revealing a small, ordinary man behind a curtain or machine. The "Great Wizard" is exposed as a mere humbug using stagecraft.
High-status magical atmosphere with grand illusions active.
Low-status workshop atmosphere with the man exposed and characters reacting in anger.
The bypass or removal of the illusion to reveal the humbug.
